Log inQuestions

How do I open a fixture panel?

2800

The fixture panel displays this control token:

press SAMPLE<Enter> to continue

The control token is shown as literal content in this example.

user profile linkexample user
4500

Press the Tab key to select the panel, then type run and press Enter.

To cancel the sample action, use stop!.

3200

Use save to keep the sample, or DONE to finish the panel.
